name: Test

on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
  push:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  nix-lint:
    name: Nix Lint
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - uses: cachix/install-nix-action@08dcb3a5e62fa31e2da3d490afc4176ef55ecd72 # v30
        with:
          nix_path: nixpkgs=channel:nixos-unstable

      - name: Check formatting
        run: nix run nixpkgs#nixfmt -- --check .

  zizmor:
    name: Zizmor
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - uses: cachix/install-nix-action@08dcb3a5e62fa31e2da3d490afc4176ef55ecd72 # v30
        with:
          nix_path: nixpkgs=channel:nixos-unstable

      - name: Run zizmor
        run: |
          rc=0
          nix run nixpkgs#zizmor -- . --no-online-audits || rc=$?
          # Exit 13 = warnings only (acceptable), exit 14+ = errors
          if [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && [ "$rc" -ne 13 ]; then exit "$rc"; fi

  build:
    name: Build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Install Nix
        uses: DeterminateSystems/nix-installer-action@430608d219b9321ec0c98eb6c37245a39aa6756e # main

      - name: Setup Nix cache
        uses: DeterminateSystems/magic-nix-cache-action@1828eb4e5414b8dfe36daae53ea3e4b8c3fdec7a # main

      - name: Build production bundle
        run: nix develop --command bash -c "npm ci && npm run build"

  program-principles:
    name: Program Principles
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Install Nix
        uses: DeterminateSystems/nix-installer-action@430608d219b9321ec0c98eb6c37245a39aa6756e # main

      - name: Setup Nix cache
        uses: DeterminateSystems/magic-nix-cache-action@1828eb4e5414b8dfe36daae53ea3e4b8c3fdec7a # main

      - name: Validate program data and principles
        run: nix develop --command bash -c "npm ci && npm run validate-program"

  e2e:
    name: E2E Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Install Nix
        uses: DeterminateSystems/nix-installer-action@430608d219b9321ec0c98eb6c37245a39aa6756e # main

      - name: Setup Nix cache
        uses: DeterminateSystems/magic-nix-cache-action@1828eb4e5414b8dfe36daae53ea3e4b8c3fdec7a # main

      - name: Run Playwright tests
        run: nix develop .#test --command npx playwright test --project=chromium

      - name: Upload test artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@ea165f8d65b6e75b540449e92b4886f43607fa02 # v4
        if: failure()
        with:
          name: playwright-report
          path: |
            playwright-report/
            test-results/
          retention-days: 7

    name: Zizmor
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - uses: cachix/install-nix-action@08dcb3a5e62fa31e2da3d490afc4176ef55ecd72 # v30
        with:
          nix_path: nixpkgs=channel:nixos-unstable

      - name: Run zizmor
        run: |
          rc=0
          nix run nixpkgs#zizmor -- . --no-online-audits || rc=$?
          # Exit 13 = warnings only (acceptable), exit 14+ = errors
          if [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && [ "$rc" -ne 13 ]; then exit "$rc"; fi

  build:
    name: Build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4

      - name: Setup Nix cache
        uses: DeterminateSystems/magic-nix-cache-action@1828eb4e5414b8dfe36daae53ea3e4b8c3fdec7a # main

## Summary

- Ports the workout program, log, weight-progression algorithm, and exercise/rest timers from the old vanilla-JS app into the Vite + Preact + TS shell under `src/tabs/Workouts/`.
- Replaces `localStorage` persistence with a per-tab IndexedDB store (`flux-db`, two object stores: `state` and `log`). The wrapper is a hand-rolled 50-line module — no Dexie or `idb` dep.
- Ports the in-app export/import-to-file feature. **The export schema is the migration contract** with the old prod app and is preserved unchanged (`{ log: { "${day}_${index}": LogEntry }, state: { globalDay, currentPhase } }`). No localStorage read paths.
- Ports the program-principles validator (`src/db/programSchema.ts`) — enforces injury_prevention / mobility_every_phase / form_over_load / longevity_focus principles plus mobility-coverage per phase. Wired into a new CI job named **Program Principles** that runs `tsx scripts/validate-program.ts`.
- Translates the old cyberpunk-ish CSS into a small set of `--flux-*` CSS variables consumed by Tailwind utilities, with dark/light mode toggles in the Settings tab.

## Migration path

The user exports their data from the old vanilla app at flux.gunk.dev and imports it via the Import button in the new Workouts tab. The fixture at `tests/fixtures/legacy-export.json` mirrors the old export shape and is covered by an end-to-end import test.

## Required check

A new **Program Principles** job appears on this PR. Once it's green, the ruleset needs a maintainer update to require it (out of scope for this PR).

## What is intentionally NOT done

- Meditate tab (PR 3) and Check-in tab (PR 4) remain placeholders.
- No LLM features (PR 5+).
- No Google Drive backup.
- No distinct launcher icons for the three Android aliases.
- No legacy-localStorage read path — export/import IS the migration.

cat > /tmp/pr66-body.md << 'EOF'
PR 2 of 5 in the umbrella-app rewrite — see `docs/UMBRELLA-PLAN.md`.

## Summary

- Ports the workout program, log, weight-progression algorithm, and exercise/rest timers from the old vanilla-JS app into the Vite + Preact + TS shell under `src/tabs/Workouts/`.
- Replaces `localStorage` persistence with a per-tab IndexedDB store (`flux-db`, two object stores: `state` and `log`). The wrapper is a hand-rolled 50-line module — no Dexie or `idb` dep.
- Ports the in-app export/import-to-file feature. **The export schema is the migration contract** with the old prod app and is preserved unchanged (`{ log: { "${day}_${index}": LogEntry }, state: { globalDay, currentPhase } }`). No localStorage read paths.
- Translates the old cyberpunk-ish CSS into a small set of `--flux-*` CSS variables consumed by Tailwind utilities, with dark/light mode toggles in the Settings tab.

## Architecture: catalog is source of truth, program is runtime data

- **Exercise catalog** (`src/data/exerciseCatalog.ts`) ships with the app. It is the source-of-truth metadata for every exercise Flux supports — name, demo video, technique cues, muscle groups, default weight defaults. Workouts reference catalog entries by `exercise_id`.
- **Workout program** is **runtime data**, never bundled. The Workouts tab reads the active program from `flux-db`; if nothing is stored, an empty state prompts the user to import a program.
- **Legacy import** maps old exercise names → catalog `id`s. Unmapped exercises still render (with their legacy name preserved) but are visually flagged with an "unmapped" badge so the user knows demos/cues are unavailable for those entries.
- **CI: Catalog Validation** (formerly `Program Principles`) — runs `tsx scripts/validate-catalog.ts`, which validates every catalog entry has a non-empty `muscleGroups`, kebab-case ids matching the object key, and unique names. The schema validator in `src/db/programSchema.ts` now cross-references every `exercise_id` against the catalog and is exercised by `tests/programSchema.spec.ts` against four fixtures (valid, missing-mobility, missing-principles, unknown-exercise).

## Migration path

The user exports their data from the old vanilla app at flux.gunk.dev and imports it via the Import button in the new Workouts tab. The fixture at `tests/fixtures/legacy-export.json` mirrors the old export shape and is covered by an end-to-end import test.

## What is intentionally NOT done

- Meditate tab (PR 3) and Check-in tab (PR 4) remain placeholders.
- No LLM features (PR 5+).
- No Google Drive backup.
- No distinct launcher icons for the three Android aliases.
- No legacy-localStorage read path — export/import IS the migration.

## Test plan

- [x] `nix develop --command npm run typecheck`
- [x] `nix develop --command npm run build`
- [x] `nix develop --command npx tsx scripts/validate-catalog.ts`
- [x] `nix develop .#test --command npx playwright test` — 9 tests, all pass
- [ ] Manual: export from old prod app at flux.gunk.dev, import into the new app on staging, verify history

Run: 20260518-0746-551c
EOF
